_comment: IMPORTANT: --provider codex-cli is REQUIRED on all hook commands. Without it, events are mislabeled as claude-code in Unimatrix source_domain attribution. Live Codex CLI MCP hook support is currently non-functional due to Codex upstream bug #16732. This configuration file is provided for forward-compatibility only. When bug #16732 is resolved, these hooks will fire for MCP tool calls without any further changes to this file.
